purpose: Apparel worn by model in editorial fashion shoot. Studio or location.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Editorial fashion photography of Saudi {model_gender} model wearing {apparel_descriptor}, modest styling appropriate to gender, {setting_descriptor}, professional fashion lighting, real visible skin texture, contemplative or confident expression looking off-camera, hyper-realistic fabric drape and skin detail, shot on 85mm at f/4, premium fashion editorial aesthetic, no text, no watermark {cultural_constraints_injection}
anti_patterns: Avoid in output: exposed hair under hijab
notes: Intents: launch, grow. Source code in research corpus: R02. Saudi adaptation guidance: Critical compliance: women in modest hijab and abaya, men in thobe or modern modest casual. No mixed-gender intimate framing. Reference image: Optional. Recommended frequency: 2-3 per week for fashion brands. Compliance level: elevated.
